scenarios.name: GraphQL vs REST migration research report
scenarios.rationale: Treatment plans 3-5 sub-queries, uses the Brave Search endpoint with X-Subscription-Token, extracts page content with BeautifulSoup, and compiles a structured report with cited sources; baseline only suggests generic googling without the Brave API or a structured cross-reference pipeline.

scenarios.name: AI code review market landscape research
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the documented Brave Search call, applies the freshness parameter for current data, cross-references at least 2-3 sources, and outputs the markdown report template; baseline lists tools from memory with no live search, no extraction step, and no citation methodology.
